items.title: As someone who watched way too many Wizards tank games last season, I really liked Jamir Watkins defense.
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
As someone who watched way too many Wizards tank games last season, I really liked Jamir Watkins defense.

6-6, 210lb wing that will turn 25-years-old on Monday.

media.title: Wizards likely to retain promising wing
media.description: The Wizards declined their $2.15 million team option for 2026-27 on wing Jamir Watkins but made Watkins a qualifying offer that makes him a restricted free agent.Because Watkins was on a two-year deal...

items.title: The Washington Wizards decline their team option for Jamir Watkins, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Washington Wizards decline their team option for Jamir Watkins, a league source told @spotrac.com.

The Wizards did tender a qualifying offer to Watkins. He'll now be a restricted free agent this offseason.
